guidances.note: Management guided >20% revenue growth for FY27, reiterated multiple times in Q&A
EBITDA margin guided to move towards 17% then 18% by FY28, from 16.3% in FY26

guidances.for_period: Q3 FY27 (commercial production; facility operational by Dec 2026)
guidances.note: Spooling & fabrication facility for data center segment, ~INR70cr capex backed by INR185cr LOI; trial runs Q2 FY27, commercial production targeted mid-Q3 FY27; capex already underway and JCO/fittings lines already commissioned
Company is L1 (lowest bidder) on BHEL tender worth ~INR50cr; order expected within 30-45 days of the call; further BHEL tenders expected to open Aug-Sep 2026
~INR200cr capex program (seamless capacity to 6,000 MTPA vs 4,800 MTPA planned, fittings entry, 100% backward integration) confirmed fully commissioned as of Q4 FY26 concall (26 May 2026)
